case_title: CHUA, KIM vs. SMITH, WILLIAM BRECK et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, WILLIAM BRECK

3:40 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. VISITING JUDGE OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE PRESIDING. LORETTA NAJARA, REPORTER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR THE SUM OF $1,800.00 WITH A $900.00 CREDIT. BALANCE OF $900.00 TO BE PAID BY THE DEFENDANT IN PAYMENTS OF $75.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON 8/1/96 AND ON THE FIRST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT BECOMES IMMEDIATELY DUE AND PAYABLE UPON EX- PARTE APPLICATION OF PLAINTIFF TO THE COURT WITH NOTICE TO THE DEFENDANT PER CRC AND CCP.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUA, KIM AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, WILLIAM BRECK DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, SETTLED IN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT SMITH, WILLIAM BRECK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, WILLIAM BRECK $1,800.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,800.00, DEFT. HAS A CREDIT OF $900.00. BALANCE OF $900.00 TO BE PAID AT $75.00 PER MON BEGINNING 8/1/96 AND ON THE FIRST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID FULLY. PAYMENTS TO BE BY RASHIERS CHECK OR MONEY ORDER PAYABLE TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTY. IF DEFT. DEFAULTS ON ANY PAYMENT, PLTF. GETS EX-PARTE JUDGMT

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHUA, KIM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-16-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 02 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON JUL-22-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
